title: Idena Bubble Wrap for Shipping Protection - 40 cm x 10 m Roll - 70 μ - for Transportation - 10400 5 m x 40 cm 750mm x 50M White
features: On a roll, ideal for wrapping
Secure shock-absorbing layer and filling material
description: The 0.4 x 5 metres large bubble wrap by Idena comes on a roll. Whether it's for protecting glasses, porcelain or other items, with this bubble wrap everything is secured. Ideal protection for sensitive, fragile products. The wrap is ideal for protecting items being moved, shipped or transported. The flexible bubble wrap can be used as cushioned protection, intermediate layer and surface protection. The Barrier layer reduces air loss in the bubbles and guarantees long term cushioned protection. The Bubble wrap can be cleaned and directly torn off in a transverse direction. Colour: transparent. Material: Eco-friendly polyethylene, recyclable.
